---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A short, plain-English description of what you would like to see.

## Problem or Need

What problem does this solve, or what need does it address? Describe the situation from a user's perspective, not an implementation perspective.

**Example:** "As a Raspberry Pi owner running multiple services, I cannot tell at a glance whether my Conduit node went offline overnight without SSHing in."

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you have in mind. Keep it at the feature level — do not write implementation details unless you have a specific technical proposal.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of other ways to solve this problem? Why do you prefer this approach?

## Is this in the roadmap?

Check the [roadmap in README.md](../../README.md#roadmap) before submitting. If the feature is already planned for a future version, consider opening a Discussion instead to share your use case.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, mockups, or references to similar features in other projects.
